mapper.sql: , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews rv JOIN orders ro ON rv.order_id = ro.order_id WHERE ro.product_id = products.product_id) AS review_count , (SELECT ROUND(AVG(rv.rating), 1) FROM reviews rv JOIN orders ro ON rv.order_id = ro.order_id WHERE ro.product_id = products.product_id) AS avg_rating

products.product_id, products.seller_id, products.name, products.description, products.category, COALESCE(la.min_price, products.price) AS price, COALESCE(la.total_stock, products.stock_qty) AS stock_qty, products.thumbnail_url, COALESCE(la.nearest_exp, products.expiration_date) AS expiration_date, products.created_at, products.updated_at, COALESCE(la.lot_count, 0) AS lot_count

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MIN(price) AS min_price, SUM(stock_qty) AS total_stock, MIN(expiration_date) AS nearest_exp, COUNT(*) AS lot_count FROM product_lots GROUP BY product_id ) la ON la.product_id = products.product_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products(seller_id, name, description, category, price, stock_qty, thumbnail_url, expiration_date) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{price}, #{stockQty}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{expirationDate})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM products
ORDER BY price ASC, products.product_id DESC ORDER BY price DESC, products.product_id DESC ORDER BY (expiration_date IS NULL), expiration_date ASC, products.product_id DESC ORDER BY products.product_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM products
WHERE products.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY products.product_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, COALESCE(AVG(price), 0) AS avgPrice, COALESCE(MIN(price), 0) AS minPrice, COALESCE(MAX(price), 0) AS maxPrice FROM products WHERE category = #{category}
